applyBrand.description: Sets ORG white-label colors from a BRAND_PRESETS entry and re-renders.

canCreate.description: Returns true for all roles except handwerker.

createLabel.source: createLabel(){ const r=this.state.role; return r==='mieter'?'Schaden melden':r==='eigentuemer'?'Anfrage erstellen':'Neuer Vorgang'; }

tr.description: Mieter white-label i18n helper; uses mLang state.
